summary: The diff shows backend Motoko changes (Worldbuilding types, saveCharacterOrder, worldbuilding map), query hooks (useGetWorldbuilding, useUpdateWorldbuilding, saveCharacterOrder), and a dark theme CSS scope reference. However, the diff is heavily truncated and many frontend component files are only described in a summary file rather than shown as actual diffs. Based on what is visible, several frontend UI requirements lack concrete implementation evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: A visually distinct light blue 'Save' button is visible in the AdminCharactersPanel when character order has been changed via drag-and-drop; disabled/hidden when no reordering occurred.
missing_requirements.reason: No diff for AdminCharactersPanel component is shown. The frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions saveCharacterOrder in useQueries.ts hooks but no AdminCharactersPanel UI file is present in the diff to confirm the Save button rendering, conditional display logic, or light blue styling.

missing_requirements.requirement: CharacterForm and ContentForm show both a URL text field and a drag-and-drop/file upload zone; files up to 50 MB accepted with validation error above 50 MB; file converted to data URL/object URL populating image field; preview thumbnail shown.
missing_requirements.reason: No diff for CharacterForm or ContentForm components is present. The frontend-file-summaries.txt does not mention these components having an image upload zone. There is no evidence of the 50 MB validation, drag-and-drop UI, data URL conversion, or preview thumbnail being implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: A 'Worldbuilding' entry appears in AdminSidebar and navigates to AdminWorldbuildingPanel; panel displays editable fields for clans, clan eye rules, power system, rank system, Shiranagi family; supports create, update, delete operations; saving persists to backend and public WorldbuildingSection reflects updates.
missing_requirements.reason: Backend types and hooks for worldbuilding are present, but no diff for AdminSidebar, AdminWorldbuildingPanel, or WorldbuildingSection components is shown. The frontend-file-summaries.txt does not mention AdminWorldbuildingPanel or a Worldbuilding sidebar entry. No evidence of CRUD UI or public WorldbuildingSection consuming backend data is visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Form inputs, buttons, modals, and badges adopt the dark theme; dark theme does not affect public-facing site styling.
missing_requirements.reason: frontend/src/index.css is mentioned in the summary as containing a scoped .admin-dashboard dark theme, but the actual CSS diff content is not shown. There is no diff for admin panel, modal, or form components to confirm dark theme classes are applied.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration.mo module was added to the backend with a Migration.run function for state migration.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any state migration module or migration infrastructure. This is extra implementation not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: The backend actor uses a blob storage mixin (MixinStorage) and authorization mixin (MixinAuthorization) infrastructure.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention blob storage or a mixin-based authorization system as new requirements. These appear to be added beyond the stated scope.
